content: We Work Remotely: Remote jobs in design, programming, marketing and more https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs.rss We Work Remotely: Remote jobs in design, programming, marketing and more en-US 60 Lemon.io: Senior Full-stack Angular & PHP Developer Anywhere in the World 🇦🇱 Albania, 🇦🇷 Argentina, 🇦🇹 Austria, 🇦🇺 Australia, 🇧🇦 Bosnia and Herzegovina, 🇧🇴 Bolivia (Plurinational State of), 🇧🇷 Brazil, 🇧🇿 Belize, 🇨🇦 Canada, 🇨🇭 Switzerland, 🇨🇱 Chile, 🇨🇴 Colombia, 🇨🇷 Costa Rica, 🇨🇾 Cyprus, 🇨🇿 Czechia, 🇩🇪 Germany, 🇩🇰 Denmark, 🇩🇴 Dominican Republic, 🇪🇨 Ecuador, 🇪🇪 Estonia, 🇪🇸 Spain, 🇫🇮 Finland, 🇫🇷 France, 🇬🇧 United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland, 🇬🇷 Greece, 🇬🇹 Guatemala, 🇭🇳 Honduras, 🇭🇷 Croatia, 🇭🇹 Haiti, 🇮🇩 Indonesia, 🇮🇪 Ireland, 🇮🇹 Italy, 🇯🇲 Jamaica, 🇯🇵 Japan, 🇰🇷 Korea (Republic of), 🇱🇹 Lithuania, 🇱🇺 Luxembourg, 🇱🇻 Latvia, 🇲🇦 Morocco, 🇲🇩 Moldova (Republic of), 🇲🇪 Montenegro, 🇲🇰 North Macedonia, 🇲🇹 Malta, 🇲🇽 Mexico, 🇳🇱 Netherlands, 🇳🇴 Norway, 🇳🇿 New Zealand, 🇵🇦 Panama, 🇵🇪 Peru, 🇵🇬 Papua New Guinea, 🇵🇭 Philippines, 🇵🇱 Poland, 🇵🇷 Puerto Rico, 🇵🇹 Portugal, 🇵🇾 Paraguay, 🇷🇴 Romania, 🇸🇪 Sweden, 🇸🇬 Singapore, 🇸🇮 Slovenia, 🇸🇰 Slovakia, 🇸🇻 El Salvador, 🇺🇦 Ukraine, 🇺🇸 United States of America, and 🇺🇾 Uruguay Delaware AngularJS, PHP, Laravel, and TypeScript Full-Stack Programming Full-Time <img src="https://we-work-remotely.imgix.net/logos/0076/3337/logo.gif?ixlib=rails-4.0.0&w=50&h=50&dpr=2&fit=fill&auto=compress" /> <p> <strong>Headquarters:</strong> New York, NY <br /><strong>URL:</strong> <a href="https://lemon.io">https://lemon.io</a> </p> <p>Are you a talented Senior Developer looking for a remote job that lets you show your skills and get decent compensation? Look no further than <a href="https://lemon.io/for-developers/?utm_source=weworkremotely&amp;utm_medium=job_ad&amp;utm_campaign=supply_en_angular_php/.net_may_2026_job_ad">Lemon.io</a> — the marketplace that connects you with hand-picked startups in the US and Europe.</p> <p><strong>What we offer:</strong></p> <ul> <li>The rate depends on your seniority level, skills and experience. We've already paid out over $11M to our engineers.</li> <li>No more hunting for clients or negotiating rates — let us handle the business side of things so you can focus on what you do best.</li> <li>We'll manually find the best project for you according to your skills and preferences.</li> <li>Choose a schedule that works best for you. It’s possible to communicate async or minimally overlap within team working hours.</li> <li>We respect your seniority so you can expect no micromanagement or screen trackers.</li> <li>Communicate directly with the clients. Most of them have technical backgrounds. Sounds good, yeah?</li> <li>We will support you from the time you submit the application throughout all cooperation stages.</li> <li>Most of our projects involve working in a fast-paced startup environment. We hope you like it as much as we do.</li> <li>Through our community, we will connect you with the best developers from more than 71 countries.</li> </ul> <p>We have several senior positions available. We are looking for Senior Software Engineers with strong knowledge of the following stacks: Angular &amp; PHP, Angular &amp; .NET &amp; TypeScript, Angular &amp; Node, Angular &amp; TypeScript, React &amp; PHP, Vue &amp; PHP, Symfony &amp; any front-end, and PHP &amp; Laravel.</p> <p><strong>Requirements for Senior Angular &amp; PHP Developer experience:</strong></p> <ul> <li>4+ years of software development experience</li> <li>3+ years of experience with Angular</li> <li>3+ years of commercial experience with PHP</li> <li>3+ years of commercial experience with Laravel</li> </ul> <p><strong>Requirements for Senior Angular &amp; .NET Developer experience:</strong></p> <ul> <li>5+ years of software development experience</li> <li>3+ years of experience with Angular and 5+ years of commercial experience with .NET OR 5+ years of experience with Angular and 3+ years of commercial experience with .NET</li> <li>Practical experience with Typescript is required</li> </ul> <p><strong>Other requirements:</strong></p> <ul> <li>Strong technical skills: as a Senior Developer, you are expected to be able to create projects from scratch and have a deep understanding of application architecture.</li> <li>Clear and effective communication in English — advanced ability to discuss business tasks, justify decisions, and communicate issues. Good self-presentation is also essential for upcoming client calls.</li> <li>Strong self-organizational skills — ability to work full-time remotely with no supervision.</li> <li>Reliability — we want to trust you and expect that you won’t let us and the client down.</li> <li>Adaptability and Flexibility — the ability to onboard the project promptly after accepting it and start delivering results quickly.</li> </ul> <p>Sounds good for you? Apply now and join the <a href="https://lemon.io/for-developers/?utm_source=weworkremotely&amp;utm_medium=job_ad&amp;utm_campaign=supply_en_angular_php/.net_may_2026_job_ad">Lemon.io</a> community!</p> <p><strong>NOT YOUR TECH STACK?</strong></p> <p>We have different projects for Senior Full-Stack Developers, so if you have 4+ years of commercial experience in software development and you are fluent with AI Agent Architect, AI Automation Architect, REact &amp; Python, REact &amp; Golang, React &amp; Java, React &amp; Ruby, PHP &amp; Vue, Vue &amp; Node.js, React &amp; .NET, Android &amp; iOS, Angular &amp; Node.js, Vue &amp; .NET, Python &amp; Vue, DevOps with Azure DevOps, MLOps, Data Science, Blockchain (Web3/Solidity/Solana), Symfony &amp; React, Symfony &amp; Vue, Symfony &amp; Angular, Symfony &amp; JavaScript &amp; Next.js &amp; TypeScript, Data Analysis, React &amp; PHP, Data Engineering, AI Engineering, Data Annotation, React &amp; Node, Svelte &amp; Python, Svelte &amp; Node, Svelte &amp; TypeScript, Rust, Shopify &amp; JavaScript, Vue &amp; Nuxt, PHP &amp; Laravel, .NET &amp; C#, Unreal Engine &amp; C++, Python &amp; LLM, Unity, Machine Learning Engineering, we would be happy to communicate and provide you with a project that matches your experience. Just apply, and we will share more details with you.</p> <p>We do not provide visa assistance, and our cooperation model does not include the benefits typically offered with direct hire.</p> <p>P.S. <strong>We work with developers from 71+ countries in different regions:</strong> Europe, LATAM, the U.S (if you are an owner of W-9 ben form), Canada, Asia (Japan, Singapore, South Korea, Philippines, Indonesia), Oceania (Australia, New Zealand, Papua New Guinea), and the the UK. However, we have some exceptions.</p> <p><strong>At the moment, we don’t have a legal basis to accept applicants from the following countries:</strong></p> <ul> <li>European: Hungary, Iceland, Liechtenstein, Kosovo, Belarus, Russia, and Serbia.</li> <li>Latin America: Cuba and Nicaragua</li> <li>Most Asian countries and Africa.</li> </ul> <p>We expand and shorten the list of
